/usr/bin/g++ -fPIC -shared -Wl,-soname,libcuda_lanczos.so -o ../lib/libcuda_lanczos.so CMakeFiles/cuda_lanczos.dir/cuda_lanczos/lanczos.cu.o  -Wl,-rpath,/home/zhiyu/PHD_Code/New_paper/Air3DGSSLAM/third_party/libtorch-2.0.0+cu118/libtorch/lib ../third_party/libtorch-2.0.0+cu118/libtorch/lib/libtorch.so ../third_party/libtorch-2.0.0+cu118/libtorch/lib/libc10.so ../third_party/libtorch-2.0.0+cu118/libtorch/lib/libkineto.a /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libcuda.so /usr/local/cuda-11.8/lib64/libnvrtc.so /usr/local/cuda-11.8/lib64/libnvToolsExt.so /usr/local/cuda-11.8/lib64/libcudart.so ../third_party/libtorch-2.0.0+cu118/libtorch/lib/libc10_cuda.so -Wl,--no-as-needed,"/home/zhiyu/PHD_Code/New_paper/Air3DGSSLAM/third_party/libtorch-2.0.0+cu118/libtorch/lib/libtorch_cpu.so" -Wl,--as-needed -Wl,--no-as-needed,"/home/zhiyu/PHD_Code/New_paper/Air3DGSSLAM/third_party/libtorch-2.0.0+cu118/libtorch/lib/libtorch_cuda.so" -Wl,--as-needed ../third_party/libtorch-2.0.0+cu118/libtorch/lib/libc10_cuda.so ../third_party/libtorch-2.0.0+cu118/libtorch/lib/libc10.so /usr/local/cuda-11.8/lib64/libcufft.so /usr/local/cuda-11.8/lib64/libcurand.so /usr/local/cuda-11.8/lib64/libcublas.so /usr/local/cuda-11.8/lib64/libcublasLt.so -Wl,--no-as-needed,"/home/zhiyu/PHD_Code/New_paper/Air3DGSSLAM/third_party/libtorch-2.0.0+cu118/libtorch/lib/libtorch.so" -Wl,--as-needed /usr/local/cuda-11.8/lib64/libnvToolsExt.so /usr/local/cuda-11.8/lib64/libcudart.so -lcudadevrt -lcudart_static -lrt -lpthread -ldl  -L"/usr/local/cuda-11.8/targets/x86_64-linux/lib/stubs" -L"/usr/local/cuda-11.8/targets/x86_64-linux/lib"
